final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical infographic with step-by-step diagrams explaining how to deploy Hermes in a Docker container and integrate it with GLMCodingPlan, labeled clearly as steps 1-2-3-4.

Style/medium: technical documentation infographic with clean instructional clarity, designed for developer onboarding
Composition: vertical four-step flow, each step occupying a distinct horizontal panel with numbered badge (1/2/3/4), diagram on left, command/code block on right, connecting flow line between steps
Subject: 
  Step 1 — Docker environment setup: Dockerfile base image selection, volume mounting diagram
  Step 2 — Hermes container deployment: docker run command, port mapping visualization, container status check
  Step 3 — GLMCodingPlan configuration: config file structure, API key integration, environment variables setup
  Step 4 — Connection verification: health check endpoint, log output sample, successful integration indicator
Scene/backdrop: neutral developer workspace aesthetic, terminal window frames, code editor panels
Lighting/mood: clear task lighting, the focused calm of a well-documented workflow
Color palette: neutral grays for infrastructure, one accent color per step for visual progression, syntax highlighting colors for code blocks
Materials/textures: clean vector lines for diagrams, monospace font texture for code, subtle panel shadows for depth
Text (verbatim): 
  Step 1: "docker pull hermes:latest"
  Step 2: "docker run -d -p 8080:8080 --name hermes hermes:latest"
  Step 3: "GLMCODINGPLAN_API_KEY=your_key_here"
  Step 4: "curl http://localhost:8080/health"
Constraints: all 4 steps clearly numbered and visually distinct, code snippets legible, diagrams show container/network relationships accurately, no step information omitted
Avoid: decorative flourishes, 3D renders, photorealistic elements, ambiguous step ordering, missing command details
